exercises.sentence: Hoy yo ________ muy feliz por las buenas noticias.
exercises.translation: Today I am very happy because of the good news.

exercises.sentence: En este momento, yo ________ trabajando en mi oficina.
exercises.translation: At this moment, I am working in my office.

exercises.sentence: Yo ________ seguro de que llegaremos a tiempo.
exercises.translation: I am sure that we will arrive on time.

exercises.sentence: ¿Cómo ________ tú hoy, mi amigo?
exercises.translation: How are you today, my friend?

exercises.sentence: Tú ________ muy cansado porque dormiste poco.
exercises.translation: You are very tired because you slept little.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué ________ tú tan callado en la cena?
exercises.translation: Why are you so quiet at dinner?

exercises.sentence: Ella ________ en la biblioteca estudiando para el examen.
exercises.translation: She is in the library studying for the exam.

exercises.sentence: Él ________ muy emocionado por su viaje a España.
exercises.translation: He is very excited about his trip to Spain.

exercises.sentence: La comida ________ deliciosa, muchas gracias.
exercises.translation: The food is delicious, thank you very much.

exercises.sentence: Ayer yo ________ en el centro comercial durante tres horas.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I was at the mall for three hours.

exercises.sentence: Yo ________ enfermo la semana pasada y no pude salir.
exercises.translation: I was sick last week and I couldn't go out.

exercises.sentence: La clase de historia ________ muy larga y aburrida.
exercises.translation: The history class was very long and boring.

exercises.sentence: ¿Dónde ________ tú ayer a las cinco de la tarde?
exercises.translation: Where were you yesterday at five in the afternoon?

exercises.sentence: Tú ________ muy atento durante toda la presentación.
exercises.translation: You were very attentive during the entire presentation.

exercises.sentence: Cuando ________ en París, ¿visitaste la Torre Eiffel?
exercises.translation: When you were in Paris, did you visit the Eiffel Tower?

exercises.sentence: Ella ________ muy ocupada todo el día ayer.
exercises.translation: She was very busy all day yesterday.

exercises.sentence: Él ________ presente en la reunión de padres.
exercises.translation: He was present at the parents' meeting.

exercises.sentence: El perro ________ nervioso por el ruido de los fuegos artificiales.
exercises.translation: The dog was nervous because of the noise of the fireworks.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo ________ siempre jugando en el parque.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I was always playing in the park.

exercises.sentence: Yo ________ leyendo un libro cuando llamaste por teléfono.
exercises.translation: I was reading a book when you called on the phone.

exercises.sentence: Antes yo ________ muy nervioso antes de hablar en público.
exercises.translation: Before, I used to be very nervous before speaking in public.

exercises.sentence: ¿Qué ________ tú haciendo cuando empezó a llover?
exercises.translation: What were you doing when it started to rain?

exercises.sentence: Tú ________ muy distraído durante la clase de matemáticas.
exercises.translation: You were very distracted during the math class.

exercises.sentence: Siempre ________ feliz cuando visitabas a tus abuelos.
exercises.translation: You were always happy when you visited your grandparents.

exercises.sentence: Ella ________ cocinando cuando sus amigos llegaron a casa.
exercises.translation: She was cooking when her friends arrived home.

exercises.sentence: Él ________ muy triste porque perdió su juguete favorito.
exercises.translation: He was very sad because he lost his favorite toy.

exercises.sentence: El cielo ________ despejado todas las mañanas de verano.
exercises.translation: The sky was clear every summer morning.

exercises.sentence: Si pudiera, yo ________ en una playa tropical ahora mismo.
exercises.translation: If I could, I would be on a tropical beach right now.

exercises.sentence: Yo ________ dispuesto a ayudarte si me lo pides con tiempo.
exercises.translation: I would be willing to help you if you ask me in time.

exercises.sentence: Sin tu ayuda, yo ________ perdido en esta ciudad desconocida.
exercises.translation: Without your help, I would be lost in this unknown city.

exercises.sentence: ¿________ tú feliz si vivieras en otro país?
exercises.translation: Would you be happy if you lived in another country?

exercises.sentence: Tú ________ mucho mejor si descansaras un poco más.
exercises.translation: You would be much better if you rested a little more.

exercises.sentence: ¿________ tú de acuerdo con nuestra nueva propuesta?
exercises.translation: Would you be in agreement with our new proposal?

exercises.sentence: Él ________ más tranquilo si supiera la verdad.
exercises.translation: He would be calmer if he knew the truth.

exercises.sentence: Ella ________ agradecida si le dieras las gracias.
exercises.translation: She would be grateful if you thanked her.

exercises.sentence: El resultado ________ listo mañana si terminamos el trabajo hoy.
exercises.translation: The result would be ready tomorrow if we finish the work today.

exercises.sentence: Mañana yo ________ muy ocupado con los nuevos proyectos.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow I will be very busy with the new projects.

exercises.sentence: Pronto yo ________ en mi casa descansando después del viaje.
exercises.translation: Soon I will be at my house resting after the trip.

exercises.sentence: No te preocupes, yo ________ a tu lado siempre.
exercises.translation: Don't worry, I will be by your side always.

exercises.sentence: ¿________ tú listo para la fiesta este fin de semana?
exercises.translation: Will you be ready for the party this weekend?

exercises.sentence: Tú ________ muy contento cuando veas el regalo.
exercises.translation: You will be very happy when you see the gift.

exercises.sentence: Seguro que ________ muy cansado después de la maratón.
exercises.translation: Surely you will be very tired after the marathon.

exercises.sentence: Ella ________ muy orgullosa de sus notas finales.
exercises.translation: She will be very proud of her final grades.

exercises.sentence: Él ________ en la oficina hasta las seis de la tarde.
exercises.translation: He will be at the office until six in the afternoon.

exercises.sentence: El clima ________ perfecto para una excursión este sábado.
exercises.translation: The weather will be perfect for an excursion this Saturday.
